description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs a before_script installing build dependencies via apt-get update -yqq and apt-get install -yqq libzip-dev unzip git libmcrypt-dev libpq-dev libcurl4-gnutls-dev libicu-dev libvpx-dev libjpeg-dev libpng-dev libxpm-dev zlib1g-dev libfreetype6-dev libxml2-dev libexpat1-dev libbz2-dev libgmp3-dev libldap2-dev unixodbc-dev libsqlite3-dev libaspell-dev libsnmp-dev libpcre3-dev libtidy-dev libonig-dev, then docker-php-ext-install mbstring pdo_mysql pdo_pgsql curl intl gd xml zip bz2 opcache, pecl install xdebug, docker-php-ext-enable xdebug, curl -sS https://getcomposer.org/installer | php, php composer.phar update, and export IN_GITLAB_CI=1. Cache the vendor/ directory between jobs. Define three test jobs—test:8.0, test:8.1, and test:8.2—each using the php:8.0, php:8.1, and php:8.2 Docker images respectively, all in the default test stage, and each running vendor/bin/phpunit --configuration tests/phpunit-unit.xml --coverage-text --colors=never, vendor/bin/phpunit --configuration tests/phpunit-integration-sqlite-ddl.xml --coverage-text --colors=never, vendor/bin/phpunit --configuration tests/phpunit-integration-mysql-ddl.xml --coverage-text --colors=never, vendor/bin/phpunit --configuration tests/phpunit-integration-mysql-json.xml --coverage-text --colors=never, vendor/bin/phpunit --configuration tests/phpunit-integration-mariadb-ddl.xml --coverage-text --colors=never, and vendor/bin/phpunit --configuration tests/phpunit-integration-mariadb-json.xml --coverage-text --colors=never. Provide MySQL and MariaDB services (mysql:8.0 and mariadb:10.6) and set MYSQL_DATABASE, MYSQL_USER, MYSQL_PASSWORD, and MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD variables for the database containers. No artifacts or special rules are defined, so the jobs run on every pipeline.
